brief_summary: Line chart plotting Prototypist's eight-week vendor tracker signal, W23 through W30, using the corrected spark array from the W30 row: [20, 29, 27, 33, 28, 25, 15, 20]. Visualizes the peak at 33 in W26, the three-week cooldown to 15 in W29, and the tick back up to +20 this week.
data_sources: data/trends/2026-W30.json — row 'Prototypist', category 'vendor', direction 'up', score 20, spark: [20, 29, 27, 33, 28, 25, 15, 20]
warnings: Corrected 2026-07-21: the original spark array [-35, -30, -25, -18, -10, 2, 15, 20] (and the matching W29 row's spark) broke the mechanical shift-and-append convention every other week in this dataset followed, fabricating a negative-territory dip Prototypist's real per-week scores (14-33 across W19-W30) never had. Chart, article prose, and newsletter prose all corrected in the same commit.
